label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where Eve ends up after all those position swaps. Let me start by writing down the initial positions: - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Center Midfielder - Claire: Right Midfielder - Dave: Left Winger - Eve: Goalkeeper Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. I need to track each swap step by step. Let me go through them one by one. First swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. After this, Dave becomes the goalkeeper and Eve becomes the left winger. Let me update the positions: - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Center Midfielder - Claire: Right Midfielder - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Left Winger Second swap: Claire and Bob trade positions. Now, Claire becomes the center midfielder and Bob becomes the right midfielder: - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Right Midfielder - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Left Winger Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Alice was fullback and Bob was right midfielder. After swapping: - Alice: Right Midfielder - Bob: Fullback - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Left Winger Fourth swap: Eve and Dave trade positions. Eve was left winger and Dave was goalkeeper. Now, Eve is goalkeeper and Dave is left winger: - Alice: Right Midfielder - Bob: Fullback - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Left Winger - Eve: Goalkeeper Fifth swap: Bob and Alice trade positions. Bob was fullback and Alice was right midfielder. After swapping: - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Right Midfielder - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Left Winger - Eve: Goalkeeper So, at the end of all these swaps, Eve is still the goalkeeper. Therefore, the answer should be (E) goalkeeper. Wait a minute, let me double-check. Maybe I made a mistake somewhere. Let me go through the swaps again. Initial positions: - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Center Midfielder - Claire: Right Midfielder - Dave: Left Winger - Eve: Goalkeeper First swap (Dave and Eve): - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Center Midfielder - Claire: Right Midfielder - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Left Winger Second swap (Claire and Bob): - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Right Midfielder - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Left Winger Third swap (Alice and Bob): - Alice: Right Midfielder - Bob: Fullback - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Left Winger Fourth swap (Eve and Dave): - Alice: Right Midfielder - Bob: Fullback - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Left Winger - Eve: Goalkeeper Fifth swap (Bob and Alice): - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Right Midfielder -
